title: Execute The AGV Tote Exchange Sequence
summary: Carry out the source-described AGV tote exchange sequence in which exchange staging occurs when a tote is imminently full or completely full, an AGV positions under the racking for lift, an empty-tote AGV positions behind the tote location under the sorter, and the two AGVs perform a simultaneous move-out/move-in so the empty tote is lowered into the rack and the AGV roles transition for the next pickup cycle.
when_to_use: Use when performing or understanding the documented AGV tote exchange sequence for a tote location where exchange staging has occurred because the tote is imminently full or completely full.
not_for: Do not use as a detailed control-level operating instruction for HMI actions, button presses, or commands, because the source provides only a conceptual training sequence.
Do not use as a recovery procedure for AGV faults, failed positioning, or incomplete exchanges, because the source does not provide recovery actions.

responsibilities: Observe or carry out the documented tote exchange sequence as described in the training source.
Verify AGV positioning under the racking and behind the tote location.
Recognize the expected simultaneous move-out/move-in exchange pattern.
Recognize the post-exchange AGV role transition.

safety_notes: The source is a training explanation and does not provide explicit safety controls, lockout/tagout steps, or production-stop requirements.
Do not infer or perform undocumented controls, commands, or manual interventions not stated in the source.
Escalate if AGV movement or positioning does not match the documented exchange pattern.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the AGV exchange area
Visibility of AGV movement under the racking and sorter
Source training material describing the exchange sequence

access_required: Access to the AGV exchange area
system_preconditions: A tote exchange is being staged based on the documented fullness threshold, described as a tote being imminently full or completely full.
An AGV with no tote is designated to the tote zone for lift positioning.
An AGV with an empty tote is available to travel under the sorter and position behind the tote location.

visual_references.description: Training video frame describing the tote exchange process, including staging threshold, under-rack positioning, simultaneous move-out/move-in, empty tote lowering, and AGV role transition.

steps.title: Confirm exchange staging condition
steps.purpose: Establish that the tote exchange sequence applies at this tote location.
steps.instruction: Identify that the tote exchange is being staged based on the documented fullness threshold, described as a tote being imminently full or completely full.
steps.expected_result: The tote location is recognized as being in an exchange staging condition supported by the source.
steps.healthy_condition: The tote is understood to be at the documented staging threshold for exchange.
steps.failure_condition: The tote does not appear to meet the documented staging condition, or the exchange trigger cannot be confirmed from the available source-supported context.

actions.label: Identify staging threshold
actions.exact_action: Identify that the tote exchange is being staged based on the documented fullness threshold, described as a tote being imminently full or completely full.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Look for the training explanation that staging for an exchange can happen when a tote is imminently full or completely full.

stop_or_escalate_if: The exchange staging condition cannot be confirmed from the documented fullness threshold.
Observed exchange activity does not align with the source-described staging concept.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Staging for an exchange can happen when a tote is immediately full or completely full, eminently filled.

steps.title: Position AGV with no tote under the racking
steps.purpose: Place the designated AGV in the source-described position for the lift portion of the exchange.
steps.instruction: Position an AGV with no tote that is designated to the tote zone under the racking for a lift.
steps.expected_result: The no-tote AGV is positioned under the racking in preparation for lifting the tote.
steps.healthy_condition: The designated AGV is under the racking and positioned for the lift as described in the source.
steps.failure_condition: The AGV cannot position under the racking or is not in the documented lift position.

actions.label: Position no-tote AGV
actions.exact_action: Position an AGV with no tote that is designated to the tote zone under the racking for a lift.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Look for the training frame or explanation showing an AGV with no tote moving under the racking to position for lift.

stop_or_escalate_if: The AGV cannot position under the racking as described.
The AGV assigned to the tote zone is not the AGV in position for the lift.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: An AGV with no tote that is designated to the tote zone moves under the racking to position for a lift. The tote is lifted in position.

steps.title: Lift the tote in position
steps.purpose: Complete the lift state described before the exchange movement continues.
steps.instruction: Lift the tote into position as described in the source.
steps.expected_result: The tote is lifted in position for the exchange sequence.
steps.healthy_condition: The tote is in the lifted position described by the training source.
steps.failure_condition: The tote is not lifted into position or the lift state cannot be achieved.

actions.label: Lift tote
actions.exact_action: Lift the tote into position as described in the source.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Look for the portion of the training material stating that the tote is lifted in position.

stop_or_escalate_if: The tote cannot be lifted into position.
The observed lift state does not match the source-described sequence.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: An AGV with no tote that is designated to the tote zone moves under the racking to position for a lift. The tote is lifted in position.

steps.title: Position empty-tote AGV behind the tote location
steps.purpose: Set up the second AGV for the simultaneous exchange movement.
steps.instruction: Have an AGV with an empty tote travel under the sorter and position itself behind the tote location.
steps.expected_result: The empty-tote AGV is positioned behind the tote location under the sorter.
steps.healthy_condition: The empty-tote AGV is behind the tote location and ready for the exchange movement.
steps.failure_condition: The empty-tote AGV cannot position behind the tote location as described.

actions.label: Position empty-tote AGV
actions.exact_action: Have an AGV with an empty tote travel under the sorter and position itself behind the tote location.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Look for the training frame or explanation showing the empty-tote AGV positioned behind the tote under the sorter.

stop_or_escalate_if: The AGV with an empty tote cannot position behind the tote location.
The observed AGV arrangement does not match the documented behind-the-tote positioning.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: An AGV with an empty tote that travels under the sorter position itself behind it and then the AGV with the full tote moves out into the aisle and the AGV with the empty tote moves into the rack location and lowers its empty tote into the rack.

steps.title: Perform the simultaneous exchange movement
steps.purpose: Execute the core exchange pattern described by the source.
steps.instruction: Perform the exchange so the AGV with the full tote moves out into the aisle while the AGV with the empty tote moves into the rack location at the same time.
steps.expected_result: The full-tote AGV moves out into the aisle while the empty-tote AGV moves into the rack location simultaneously.
steps.healthy_condition: The exchange follows the documented simultaneous pattern: one AGV moves out and the other moves in together.
steps.failure_condition: The AGV movement does not match the documented simultaneous exchange pattern.

actions.label: Execute simultaneous exchange
actions.exact_action: Perform the exchange so the AGV with the full tote moves out into the aisle while the AGV with the empty tote moves into the rack location at the same time.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Look for the explanation that one AGV comes behind and both move simultaneously, with one moving out and one moving in.

stop_or_escalate_if: Observed AGV movement does not match the documented simultaneous exchange pattern.
The full-tote AGV does not move into the aisle while the empty-tote AGV moves into the rack location.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The goal is to have one AGV come behind it and then move simultaneously together. One moves out, one moves in.

An AGV with an empty tote that travels under the sorter position itself behind it and then the AGV with the full tote moves out into the aisle and the AGV with the empty tote moves into the rack location and lowers its empty tote into the rack.

steps.title: Lower the empty tote into the rack
steps.purpose: Complete placement of the replacement tote into the rack location.
steps.instruction: Lower the empty tote into the rack location.
steps.expected_result: The empty tote is lowered into the rack location.
steps.healthy_condition: The empty tote is placed into the rack location as part of the exchange.
steps.failure_condition: The empty tote is not lowered into the rack location or is not placed as described.

actions.label: Lower empty tote
actions.exact_action: Lower the empty tote into the rack location.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Look for the portion of the training explanation stating that the AGV with the empty tote lowers its empty tote into the rack.

stop_or_escalate_if: The empty tote cannot be lowered into the rack location.
The tote placement does not complete after the move-in portion of the exchange.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: An AGV with an empty tote that travels under the sorter position itself behind it and then the AGV with the full tote moves out into the aisle and the AGV with the empty tote moves into the rack location and lowers its empty tote into the rack.

steps.title: Recognize post-exchange AGV role transition
steps.purpose: Confirm the source-described operational state after the exchange completes.
steps.instruction: After the empty tote is dropped, recognize that this AGV becomes the AGV that will pick up the next tote in that zone.
steps.expected_result: The AGV that dropped the empty tote is understood to be the next AGV for pickup in that zone.
steps.healthy_condition: The post-exchange AGV role transition matches the source description.
steps.failure_condition: The AGV role transition is not recognized or does not match the documented sequence.

actions.label: Confirm AGV role transition
actions.exact_action: After the empty tote is dropped, recognize that this AGV becomes the AGV that will pick up the next tote in that zone.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Look for the training explanation stating that the AGV that just dropped its tote becomes the AGV that will pick up the next tote.

stop_or_escalate_if: The post-exchange AGV role transition does not match the documented source behavior.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: This AGV that just dropped its tote will now become the AGV that will pick up the next tote.

success_criteria: The tote exchange is staged at the documented fullness condition.
An AGV with no tote positions under the racking for lift.
An AGV with an empty tote positions behind the tote location under the sorter.
The AGV with the full tote moves out into the aisle while the AGV with the empty tote moves into the rack location simultaneously.
The empty tote is lowered into the rack location.
The AGV that dropped the empty tote becomes the AGV that will pick up the next tote in that zone.
healthy_conditions: Exchange staging occurs when the tote is imminently full or completely full, as described by the source.
The designated no-tote AGV is positioned under the racking for lift.
The empty-tote AGV is positioned behind the tote location under the sorter.
The exchange follows the documented simultaneous move-out/move-in pattern.
The empty tote is successfully lowered into the rack location.
The post-exchange AGV role transition matches the training description.
failure_conditions: Observed AGV movement does not match the documented simultaneous exchange pattern.
An AGV cannot position under the racking or behind the tote location as described.
The tote cannot be lifted into position.
The empty tote is not lowered into the rack location.
The source does not provide detailed operator controls or recovery actions for abnormal conditions.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the observed AGV movement does not match the documented simultaneous exchange pattern.
Escalate if the AGV cannot position under the racking or behind the tote location as described.
Escalate for faults, failed backfill, or incomplete replacement scenarios because the source does not provide recovery actions in this runbook candidate.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Training frame describing the full tote exchange sequence from staging through role transition.

missing_details: The source is a training explanation and does not provide explicit operator controls, HMI interactions, button presses, or commands.
The source does not define permissions, role boundaries beyond operator-level use, or approval requirements.
The source does not provide detailed recovery actions for failed positioning, failed lift, or incomplete exchange.
The source does not provide a time estimate for completing the exchange.
The source does not explicitly state production-stop or LOTO requirements.
